purpose: Positive and negative discovery boundaries for the frontend-design router.

cases.request: Help me design how this subscription-upgrade flow should work.
Give me three visual directions for this SaaS landing page.
Build this responsive profile screen in the existing frontend.
Review the UX and visual quality of this deployed checkout page.
Rewrite the empty-state copy and accessible label.
Make the approved interface production-ready and accessible.
Generate a standalone watercolor hero illustration.
Write the database migration for the orders table.
Analyze this CSV and calculate monthly retention.
Configure the worker queue and deployment secrets.
